current_entries.en_definition: Formerly.
currently, now, at this moment in time, at the present time.
Randomly, haphazardly.
(idiomatic) On occasion, sometimes.
A mythical country said to have sunk into the Atlantic Ocean.
(pathology) A reduction in the functionality of an organ caused by disease, injury or lack of use. [from early 17th c.]
(clothing) One's dress; what one wears; one's clothes.
A public event where goods or property are sold to the highest bidder.
Focused on audible sound, as opposed to sight.

examples.english: Audio in Tatoeba sentences are provided by Shtooka.
examples.chinese: Tatoeba句子的音頻是由Shtooka所提供。

current_entries.en_definition: A performance, by an aspiring performer, to demonstrate suitability or talent.
An act of hearing; being heard.
Of, relating to, or coming from the south.

(anthropology, paleontology) Any of several extinct hominids, belonging to the genera Australopithecus and Paranthropus in the subtribe Australopithecina when seen as distinct, and sometimes other closely related genera. [from 20th c.]
Of or pertaining to Austronesia.
The originator or creator of a work, especially of a literary composition; or, one of the creators of a collaborative work.

examples.english: Richard Roberts is the author of numerous books.
examples.chinese: 理察·罗伯茨是很多本书的作者。

current_entries.en_definition: (US, Canada, Philippines, AU, NZ) A type of motor vehicle designed to move on the ground under its own stored power and intended to carry a driver, a small number of additional passengers, and a very limited amount of other load.
A dissection performed on a cadaver to find possible cause(s) of death.
(grammar) Relating to an auxiliary verb.
A large mass or body of snow and ice sliding swiftly down a mountain side, or falling down a precipice.
The large, usually yellowish-green or black, savory fruit of the avocado tree.
A feeling of fear and reverence.

examples.english: I am immediately in awe of you!
examples.chinese: 我瞬间对你肃然起敬！

current_entries.en_definition: Very bad.
Exceedingly great; usually applied intensively.
The first or lowest academical degree conferred by universities and colleges; a bachelor's degree.

examples.english: I am a bachelor.
examples.chinese: 我单身。

current_entries.en_definition: Someone who has achieved a bachelor's degree.
(obsolete) An unmarried woman.
One's social heritage, or previous life; what one did in the past.

examples.english: There is a castle in the background of the picture.
examples.chinese: 图片的背景是一座城堡。

current_entries.en_definition: Information relevant to the current situation about past events; history.
(literal) A suddenly reversed or backward motion, such as of a rope or elastic band when it snaps under tension.

A knapsack, sometimes mounted on a light frame, but always supported by straps, worn on a person’s back for the purpose of carrying things, especially when hiking, or on a student's back when carrying books.
An object or a person put in the rear or in the back of something to reinforce, hold, support.
A bucket or scoop used for removing water from a boat etc.
A rounded bundle or package of goods in a cloth cover, and corded for storage or transportation.

examples.english: Bale was fouled, and his team was awarded a free kick.
examples.chinese: 贝尔被犯规了，球队获得了任意球。

current_entries.en_definition: A bundle of compressed fibers (especially hay, straw, cotton, or wool), compacted for shipping and handling and bound by twine or wire.
A measurement of hay equal to 10 flakes. Approximately 70-90 lbs (32-41 kg).
A measurement of paper equal to 10 reams.
Beam, crossbeam; squared timber; a tie beam of a house, stretching from wall to wall, especially when laid so as to form a loft, "the balks".
Of or relating to the Balkan Peninsula.
Coarse gravel or similar material laid to form a bed for roads or railroads, or in making concrete; track ballast.
Approximate; close; on the right order of magnitude.

examples.english: You can go to the ballpark on this bus.
examples.chinese: 坐這個公車可以到球場。

current_entries.en_definition: A Northwestern Iranian language spoken mainly in SW Pakistan (80% of speakers), SE Iran and S Afghanistan. SIL standard divides Balochi into three related languages, Eastern Balochi, Southern Balochi and Western Balochi.
Of or pertaining to the Baltic region or the Baltic Sea.
A geographic region of Northern Europe, consisting of the three countries to the east of the Baltic Sea, i.e. Latvia, Lithuanian and Estonia; in full, the Baltics or the Baltic states.
A strip of gauze or similar material used to protect or support a wound or injury.

examples.english: The nurse gently put a bandage around my head.
examples.chinese: 护士轻柔地给我的头缠上绷带。

current_entries.en_definition: Of, from, or pertaining to Bangladesh.
A branch office of such an institution.

examples.english: You can get a loan from a bank.
examples.chinese: 你可以從银行贷款。

current_entries.en_definition: The monetary assets of a person or organization.
A large celebratory meal; a feast.
(ornithology) One of the many side branches of a feather, which collectively constitute the vane.
A fireplace or pit for grilling food, typically used outdoors and traditionally employing hot charcoal as the heating medium.

examples.english: We'll have a barbecue at the beach.
examples.chinese: 我們要在海邊烤肉。

current_entries.en_definition: A person whose profession is cutting the hair and beards of usually male customers.

examples.english: The barber gave him a haircut.
examples.chinese: 理髮師為他理了頭髮。

current_entries.en_definition: A professional poet and singer, like among the ancient Celts, whose occupation was to compose and sing verses in honor of the heroic achievements of princes and brave men.
Naked, uncovered.
Wearing nothing on the feet.

examples.english: Look, the boys are walking barefoot in the water.
examples.chinese: 看哪,年輕人赤腳走在水裡。

current_entries.en_definition: (by extension) Without using a tool or weapon.
(military, chiefly, in the plural) A building for soldiers, especially within a garrison; originally referred to temporary huts, now usually to a permanent structure or set of buildings.
Unless something happens; excepting; in the absence of.
(transitive, informal) To criticize harshly.
A group or collection of things of the same kind, such as a batch of letters or the next batch of business.
A wax-resist method of dyeing fabric.
(baseball) The player attempting to hit the ball with a bat.

examples.english: To be a good batter, you've got to hang loose and follow your instincts.
examples.chinese: 想成為一個好的擊球手的話，你要在球場上時刻保持鎮定，還要學會相信自己的直覺。

current_entries.en_definition: Obscene; filthy; unchaste. [from 15th Century]
used to say that someone or something has a particular identity, quality, or condition

examples.english: She is a doctor.
examples.chinese: 她是一名醫生。

current_entries.en_definition: to exist or be present in a place

examples.english: The keys are on the table.
examples.chinese: 鑰匙在桌上。

current_entries.en_definition: to happen or take place

examples.english: The meeting will be tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 會議將於明天舉行。

current_entries.en_definition: A horizontal strip of land, usually sandy, adjoining water.

examples.english: Can you hear the noise of the waves on the beach?
examples.chinese: 你能聽到沙灘上海浪的聲音嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: A signal fire to notify of the approach of an enemy, or to give any notice, commonly of warning.
(nautical) A signal, buoy, post, or other conspicuous mark erected on an eminence near the shore, or moored in shoal water, as a guide to mariners, particularly to warn vessels of danger.
Facial hair on the chin, cheeks, jaw and neck.

examples.english: Please shave my beard.
examples.chinese: 请刮一下胡子。

current_entries.en_definition: (mechanical engineering) A mechanical device that supports another part or reduces friction.
(navigation, nautical) The horizontal angle between the direction of an object and another object, or between it and that of true north; a heading or direction.
One's posture, demeanor, or manner.
Pertaining to, or having the form, nature, or habits of, a beast.
A semiaquatic rodent of the genus Castor, having a wide, flat tail and webbed feet, native to the Northern Hemisphere.
A wax secreted by bees from which they make honeycomb; or, the processed form of this wax used in the manufacture of various goods.
At an earlier or preceding time.

examples.english: Please let me know the schedule beforehand.
examples.chinese: 請你事先把計劃告訴我。

current_entries.en_definition: A person who begs.

examples.english: He is rich yet he lives like a beggar.
examples.chinese: 他很富有，但活得像个乞丐。

current_entries.en_definition: The act of doing that which begins anything; commencement of an action, state, or space of time; entrance into being or upon a course; the first act, effort, or state of a succession of acts or states.
Of, from, or pertaining to Belgium or the Belgian people.

examples.english: Jacques is a Belgian name.
examples.chinese: 雅克是比利时的名字。

current_entries.en_definition: Of or pertaining to war.
The abdomen (especially a fat one).
(government) A long seat for politicians in a parliamentary chamber.

examples.english: I'm going to sit on the bench over there next to the street lamp.
examples.chinese: 我會在那盞街燈旁邊的長凳上坐下來。

current_entries.en_definition: An economic and customs union made up of Belgium, the Netherlands and Luxembourg.
A small succulent fruit, of any one of many varieties.

examples.english: Acai is a berry that comes from the state of Pará, Brazil.
examples.chinese: 阿薩伊是一種產自巴西帕拉州的漿果。

current_entries.en_definition: (botany) A soft fruit which develops from a single ovary and contains seeds not encased in pits.
One who is betrothed, i.e. a fiancé or fiancée.
(literary, or, archaic) Between.
(LGBTQ, slang) Bisexual.

examples.english: Mary's wife is bi.
examples.chinese: 玛丽的妻子是双性恋。

current_entries.en_definition: An item of clothing for people (especially babies) tied around their neck to protect their clothes from getting dirty when eating.
To quarrel in a tiresome, insulting manner.
(historical) A two-cornered hat, worn by European and American military and naval officers from the 1790s.
A tooth with two cusps; a premolar tooth.
Happening every two years.

(constellation, especially, US) A bright circumpolar asterism of the northern sky, said to resemble a ladle or cart, and a part of the constellation Ursa Major which includes the stars Mizar, Dubhe, and Alkaid. [from 1845] The other stars comprising it are Alioth, Megrez, Merak, and Phecda.
(phonetics) A speech sound articulated with both lips.
(British, rare) 1015, a thousand billion (long scale) or a million milliard.

examples.english: The Earth is smoother than a billiard ball.
examples.chinese: 地球比台球更光滑。

current_entries.en_definition: A large wave, swell, surge, or undulating mass of something, such as water, smoke, fabric or sound
A box, frame, crib, or enclosed place, used as a storage container.

examples.english: Bin lived in Singapore.
examples.chinese: 本住在新加坡。

current_entries.en_definition: A container for rubbish or waste.
to tie or fasten something tightly

examples.english: Bind the package with string.
examples.chinese: 用繩把包裹捆好。

current_entries.en_definition: to impose a legal or moral duty on someone

examples.english: The agreement binds both parties.
examples.chinese: 協議約束雙方。

current_entries.en_definition: to fasten pages together to make a book

examples.english: The documents were bound into a single volume.
examples.chinese: 文件被裝訂成一冊。

current_entries.en_definition: A short period of excessive consumption, especially of food, alcohol, narcotics, etc.
(algebra) A polynomial with two terms.
(often, childish) A bird; especially, a small and cute one.
A person who blabs; a tattler; a telltale.
having the darkest colour, like the colour of coal

examples.english: He was wearing a black jacket.
examples.chinese: 他穿着一件黑色外套。

current_entries.en_definition: relating to people with dark skin, especially people of African origin

examples.english: The museum celebrates Black history and culture.
examples.chinese: 博物館頌揚黑人歷史與文化。

current_entries.en_definition: the darkest colour, produced by the absence or absorption of light

examples.english: The design is available in black.
examples.chinese: 這款設計有黑色可供選擇。

current_entries.en_definition: (US, slang, law enforcement) A police patrol car.
Trade that is in violation of restrictions, rationing, or price controls.
A fruit-bearing shrub of the aggregate species Rubus fruticosus and some hybrids.
(card games) A common gambling card game in casinos, where the object is to get as close to 21 without going over.
(legal, computing) A list or set of people or entities to be shunned or banned, disallowed or blocked.
The extortion of money or favors by threats of public accusation, critique, or exposure.
An explosive charge for blasting.

examples.english: An icy blast of wind chilled me to the bone.
examples.chinese: 冰冷的疾風吹到我骨子裡去了。

current_entries.en_definition: (heraldry) A coat of arms or a banner depicting a coat of arms.
A chemical, such as sodium hypochlorite or hydrogen peroxide, or a preparation of such a chemical, used for disinfecting or whitening.

examples.english: Don't mix ammonia and bleach together.
examples.chinese: 别把氨水和漂白剂混在一起。

current_entries.en_definition: A small flaw which spoils the appearance of something, a stain, a spot.

examples.english: Her skin was white as milk and she had not a single blemish anywhere.
examples.chinese: 她的肌肤如同牛奶一样洁白，身上没有一处斑点。

current_entries.en_definition: A swift and overwhelming attack or effort.
A fast military offensive, typically involving a large and highly mobile tank force with air support.
A shapeless or amorphous mass; a vague shape or amount, especially of a liquid or semisolid substance; a clump, group or collection that lacks definite shape.
(transitive) To create a blockade against.

(Internet) A website that allows users to reflect, share opinions, and discuss various topics in the form of an online journal, sometimes letting readers comment on their posts. Most blogs are written in a slightly informal tone (personal journals, news, businesses, etc.)

examples.english: Do you have a blog?
examples.chinese: 你有博客吗？

current_entries.en_definition: A blemish, spot or stain made by a coloured substance.

examples.english: This blot can't be wiped out.
examples.chinese: 這污點擦不掉。

current_entries.en_definition: An uneven patch of color or discoloration.
A short, heavy club, often of wood, which is thicker or loaded at one end.
(particle physics) Having a colour charge of blue.

examples.english: The sky is blue.
examples.chinese: 天空是蓝色的。

current_entries.en_definition: Anything coloured blue, especially to distinguish it from similar objects differing only in colour.
An act of blushing; a pink or red glow on the face caused by embarrassment, shame, shyness, love, etc.
A sort of makeup, frequently a powder, used to redden the cheeks.
A color between pink and cream.
The physical structure of a human or animal seen as one single organism. [from 9th c.]

examples.english: The child's body felt feverish.
examples.chinese: 這個小孩身體很燙。

current_entries.en_definition: (wetland science, specifically) An acidic, chiefly rain-fed (ombrotrophic), peat-forming wetland. (Contrast an alkaline fen, and swamps and marshes.)
A cultural region in the west of the former Czechoslovakia and present-day Czech Republic.
Of, or relating to Bohemia or its language. [from 16th c.]
A country in South America. Official name: Plurinational State of Bolivia. Capitals: La Paz and Sucre.
(UK, Ireland, Commonwealth, vulgar) Nonsense or information deliberately intended to mislead.

examples.english: Bollocks, where in God's name did I put my house keys?
examples.chinese: 可恶，家的钥匙到底放哪去了?

current_entries.en_definition: The Hindi-language film industry located in Mumbai.
(historical) A Russian communist revolutionary, a member of the Bolshevik Party in the Communist Revolution of Russia in 1917.
An explosive device used or intended as a weapon, especially, one dropped from an aircraft.

examples.english: This bomb can kill many people.
examples.chinese: 这个炸弹可以炸死很多人。

current_entries.en_definition: Used to wish someone a good journey.
A traditional Scottish woollen brimless cap; a bunnet.
(Australia, British, NZ, South Africa, Commonwealth, automotive) The hinged cover over the engine of a motor car, also known as a hood in chiefly Canada and the US.
(transitive) To make into a bonsai by restricting the roots and pruning.
(colloquial, slang) A breast, especially that of an adult or adolescent female human.

A flat curved airfoil that spins about an axis perpendicular to the direction of flight, originally used in various parts of the world as a hunting weapon or, in returnable types, for sports or training.
(archaic) That which is asked or granted as a benefit or favor; a gift or benefaction.
(Hinduism) A blessing, typically a supernatural power, granted to an ascetic by a god or goddess.
(figuratively) A means of advancing oneself or accomplishing something without aid.
(computing) The process by which the operating system of a computer is loaded into its memory.
The capital city of Gironde department, France; the capital city of the region of Nouvelle-Aquitaine.
A boundary or accepted division; a border.
The tunnel inside of a gun's barrel through which the bullet travels when fired, or (by extension) its diameter.
Causing boredom or tiredness; making one feel tired and impatient.
The standardized variety of Serbo-Croatian, a South Slavic language, spoken primarily by Bosniaks in Bosnia and Herzegovina.
In a very close relationship.
A breast, one of a woman's breasts
Of or pertaining to botany; relating to the study of plants.

examples.english: We found many strange plants in a botanical garden.
examples.chinese: 我們在一家植物園裏找到了許多稀奇古怪的植物。

current_entries.en_definition: (figurative) In traffic, any narrowing of the road, especially resulting in a delay.
A cuboid space; a cuboid container, often with a hinged lid.

examples.english: You may take either the big box or the small one.
examples.chinese: 你可以拿大的盒子或是小的盒子。

current_entries.en_definition: The act of boycotting.
Any of the characters “(”, “)”, “[”, “]”, “{”, “}”, “⟨”, “⟩”, “<”, “>”, or the like, used in pairs to enclose parenthetic remarks, sections of mathematical expressions, etc.
One of several ranges of numbers.
(Hindu god) Hindu god (deva) of creation and one of the Trimurti, the others being Vishnu and Shiva.

A system of writing in which letters and some combinations of letters are represented by raised dots arranged in three or four rows of two dots each and are read by the blind and partially sighted using the fingertips.
the organ inside the head that controls thought, memory, feelings, and movement

examples.english: The human brain is extremely complex.
examples.chinese: 人類的大腦極其複雜。

current_entries.en_definition: an intelligent person who plans or organizes something

examples.english: She is the brain behind the successful project.
examples.chinese: 她是這個成功項目背後的智囊。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, idiomatic, uncommon) Of a nation or society, to be deprived of educated or talented people, who in turn migrate to larger cities or more developed nations.

A device used to slow or stop the motion of a wheel, or of a vehicle, usually by friction (although other resistive forces, such as electromagnetic fields or aerodynamic drag, can also be used); also, the controls or apparatus used to engage such a mechanism such as the pedal in a car. [from 18th c.]

examples.english: The function of the brake is to stop the car.
examples.chinese: 刹车的功能是使车停下。

current_entries.en_definition: A large Portuguese-speaking country in South America. Official name: Federative Republic of Brazil. Capital: Brasília.

examples.english: Brazil supplies the world with coffee beans of quality.
examples.chinese: 巴西向世界各地供應優質咖啡豆。

current_entries.en_definition: A person from Brazil or of Brazilian descent.

examples.english: The author is Brazilian.
examples.chinese: 作者是巴西人。

current_entries.en_definition: The first meal of the day, usually eaten in the morning.

examples.english: We made pancakes for breakfast.
examples.chinese: 我们早餐做了煎饼。

current_entries.en_definition: A swimming stroke in which the swimmer lies face down, the arms being swept forward, outward and back under the water and the legs are kicked like a frog's
The act of respiration; (countable) a single instance of this.

examples.english: Is he breathing?
examples.chinese: 他在呼吸嗎?

current_entries.en_definition: A light, gentle wind.
(figurative) Any activity that is easy, not testing or difficult.
(archaic) A wedding feast or festival; a wedding.
Emitting much light; visually dazzling; luminous, lucent, radiant.
In good spirits; happy, optimistic.
Having a clear, quick intellect; intelligent.
The topmost lip or rim of a container, or a natural feature shaped like a container.
Originally, a border or edge of a sea, a river, or other body of water; now, any border or edge.
Stimulating or invigorating.
(historical) Of the ancient inhabitants of the southern part of Britain; Brythonic.

examples.english: Fifty-two per cent of British women prefer chocolate to sex.
examples.chinese: 有百分之五十二的英國女性喜歡巧克力勝於性。

current_entries.en_definition: (chiefly, US) The British English language.
Inflexible; liable to break, snap, or shatter easily under stress, pressure, or impact; crackly.
Emotionally fragile, easily offended.
(of an accent) Strongly regional.
A mediator between a buyer and seller.

examples.english: I hear you've already contacted the broker.
examples.chinese: 听说您已经跟中介公司联系过了。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To keep an egg warm to make it hatch.
A body of running water smaller than a river; a small stream.
Having a brown colour.

examples.english: May I talk to Ms. Brown?
examples.chinese: 我能和布朗小姐说话吗？

current_entries.en_definition: (countable, and, uncountable) A colour like that of chocolate or coffee.
A purplish mark on the skin due to leakage of blood from capillaries under the surface that have been damaged by a blow.
(historical) The second month of the French Republican Calendar, from October 22, 23 or 24 to November 20, 21 or 22.
A meal eaten later in the day than breakfast and earlier than lunch, and often consisting of typical foods from both of those meals.
An implement consisting of multiple more or less flexible bristles or other filaments attached to a handle, used for any of various purposes including cleaning, painting, and arranging hair.

examples.english: I have to brush up my French before I go to Paris to study.
examples.chinese: 我去巴黎讀書之前要先練好我的法文。

current_entries.en_definition: A pirate.
Siddhartha Gautama, the Nepali prince and Indian philosopher and teacher who founded Buddhism.

examples.english: Praise be to Buddha.
examples.chinese: 阿弥陀佛。

current_entries.en_definition: (Maritime English) A person far removed from the conversation.

examples.english: Tom is your buddy.
examples.chinese: 湯姆是你的兄弟。

current_entries.en_definition: Of the color of buff leather, a brownish yellow.

examples.english: Let's play a game of blind man's buff.
examples.chinese: 咱们玩儿捉迷藏吧。

current_entries.en_definition: (MLE, _, slang) Physically attractive.
A brownish yellow colour.
A counter or sideboard from which food and drinks are served or may be bought.

examples.english: Two for the lunch buffet, please.
examples.chinese: 兩人份自助午餐，謝謝。

current_entries.en_definition: An expression of disagreement or disbelief.
An object which is sticking out from a surface; a swelling, protuberant part; a bending outward, especially when caused by pressure.

A breed of dog developed in England by the crossing of the bullbaiting dog and the Pug to produce a ladies' companion dog, having a very smooth coat, a flattened face, wrinkly cheeks, powerful front legs, and smaller hind legs.
A time-sensitive news item or short news report.
A short printed publication, especially one produced regularly by an organization.
(of a material) Capable of withstanding a direct shot by a bullet fired from a gun.

examples.english: Tom was wearing a bulletproof vest, so the bullet didn't kill him.
examples.chinese: 湯姆穿著一件防彈衣，所以子彈沒把他殺死。

current_entries.en_definition: A defensive wall or rampart.
(British, India) To fail to attend school or work without permission; to play truant (usually as in 'to bunk off').
(military) A hardened shelter, often partly buried or fully underground, designed to protect the inhabitants from falling bombs or other attacks.
A heavy load.

examples.english: That responsibility is a burden to him.
examples.chinese: 那个责任对他是个负担。

current_entries.en_definition: A historical region and former administrative region of France; since 2016, part of the administrative region of Bourgogne-Franche-Comté.
Of a deep purple red color like that of Burgundy wine.
A small piece of material left on an edge after a cutting operation.
(engineering) A revolving disk or cone with abrasive surfaces used to grind hard products in a grinder or mill.
A province and metropolitan municipality in northwestern Anatolia Turkey, on the Sea of Marmara.
A country in East Africa. Official name: Republic of Burundi.
(automotive) A motor vehicle for transporting large numbers of people along roads.

examples.english: You'd better go by bus.
examples.chinese: 你最好坐公共汽車去。

current_entries.en_definition: An electrical conductor or interface serving as a common connection for two or more circuits or components.
A soft, fatty foodstuff made by churning the cream of milk (generally cow's milk).

examples.english: We make milk into cheese and butter.
examples.chinese: 我們把牛奶製成乳酪和奶油。

current_entries.en_definition: A flying insect of the order Lepidoptera, distinguished from moths by their diurnal activity and generally brighter colouring. [from 11th c.]

examples.english: Oh, there's a butterfly!
examples.chinese: 哦！有一隻蝴蝶！

current_entries.en_definition: Unexpectedly, accidentally; without foreplanning.
(conjunctive, idiomatic) Incidentally; used in referencing a parenthetical statement not timely, central, or crucial to the topic at hand; foregone, passed by, something that has already happened.
(colloquial) Goodbye.

examples.english: He departed without so much as saying good bye.
examples.chinese: 他連再見也不說就走了。

current_entries.en_definition: Having been or happened in the distant past.
(by extension) Any of various cultivars of the species Brassica oleracea.

examples.english: Can I have seconds on rice and cabbage?
examples.chinese: 我可以再吃一份米飯和高麗菜嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: (uncountable, vegetable) The leaves of this plant eaten as a vegetable.
(US) A small dwelling characteristic of the frontier, especially when built from logs with simple tools and not constructed by professional builders, but by those who meant to live in it.

examples.english: The writer is living in a log cabin.
examples.chinese: 那个作家生活在小木屋中。

current_entries.en_definition: (computing) A fast temporary storage where recently or frequently used information is stored to avoid having to reload it from a slower storage medium.
A rich, sweet dessert food, typically made of flour, sugar, and eggs and baked in an oven, and often covered in icing.

examples.english: Your cake is delicious.
examples.chinese: 您的蛋糕很美味。

current_entries.en_definition: A native or resident of the state of California in the United States of America.
A pointed projection on a horseshoe to prevent its slipping.
A department of Normandy, France.
The hill outside Jerusalem which is traditionally held to be the location of the crucifixion of Jesus.
(Greek god) A sea nymph who entertained Odysseus on her island, Ogygia, for seven years.
a person from Cambodia or of Cambodian descent
(textiles) A pattern on clothing consisting of irregularly shaped patches that are either greenish/brownish, brownish/whitish, or bluish/whitish, as used by ground combat forces.
A series of operations undertaken to achieve a set goal.
An artificial waterway or artificially improved river used for travel, shipping, or irrigation.

examples.english: This ship is too big to pass through the canal.
examples.chinese: 这艘船太大，没法通过运河。

current_entries.en_definition: A light, sweet, white wine from the Canary Islands.

examples.english: My canary was killed by a cat.
examples.chinese: 我的金絲雀被一隻貓殺死了。

current_entries.en_definition: A light source consisting of a wick embedded in a solid, flammable substance such as wax, tallow, or paraffin.

examples.english: The candle went out instead of having been put out.
examples.chinese: 蜡烛出去，而不必被扑灭。

current_entries.en_definition: (plant disease) A plant disease marked by gradual decay.
An avian disease affecting doves, poultry, parrots and birds of prey, caused by Trichomonas gallinae.

(watercraft) A small long and narrow boat, propelled by one or more people (depending on the size of canoe), using single-bladed paddles. The paddlers face in the direction of travel, in either a seated position, or kneeling on the bottom of the boat. Canoes are open on top, and pointed at both ends.

examples.english: We went down a river by canoe.
examples.chinese: 我們乘著獨木舟向河的下游而行。

current_entries.en_definition: An argot, the jargon of a particular class or subgroup.
A private or secret language used by a religious sect, gang, or other group.
A piece of canvas cloth stretched across a frame on which one may paint.
The often ornamental coverings for an animal, especially a horse or an elephant.

(anatomy) Any of the small blood vessels (from 5 to 10 micrometres/micrometers (μm) in diameter) that connect arteries to veins (They are the smallest blood vessels in the body: they convey blood between the arterioles and venules).
(slang, dated) used as an expression of approval, satisfaction, or delight.

examples.english: Kyoto was the former capital of Japan.
examples.chinese: 京都市曾經是日本的首都。

current_entries.en_definition: (countable, architectural element) The uppermost part of a column.
(uncountable, business, finance, insurance) Money and wealth. The means to acquire goods and services, especially in a non-barter system.
(astrology) The zodiac sign for the goat, ruled by Saturn and covering December 22 – January 20 (tropical astrology) or January 15 – February 14 (sidereal astrology).
A title or brief explanation attached to an illustration, cartoon, user interface element, etc.
(cinematography, television) A piece of text appearing on screen as a subtitle or other part of a film or broadcast, describing dialogue (and sometimes other sound) for viewers who cannot hear.
A (sometimes hardened) piece of this confection.
A convoy or procession of travellers, their cargo and vehicles, and any pack animals, especially camels crossing a desert.
Any salt or ester of carbonic acid.
(geology) the Carboniferous period
(organic chemistry) A univalent functional group consisting of a carbonyl and a hydroxyl functional group (-CO.OH); characteristic of carboxylic acids.
One’s calling in life; one's working occupation or profession, especially when pursued seriously and/or over a long period of time.
(obsolete) A short gallop of a horse. [16th–18th c.]
Having the characteristics of a caricature, grotesque.
To represent someone in an exaggerated or distorted manner.

(constellation) A summer constellation of the southern sky, said to resemble the keel of a ship. It contains the star Canopus, the second brightest star in the night sky. Until 1763, it was part of a larger constellation, Argo Navis.
A fabric used as a complete floor covering.
A native or inhabitant of Carthage.
(comics) A humorous drawing, often with a caption, or a strip of such drawings.

examples.english: Do you know this cartoon?
examples.chinese: 你知道这部漫画吗？

current_entries.en_definition: (comics) A drawing satirising current public figures.
(arts) An artist's preliminary sketch.
(animation) A cartoon series.
A gymnastic maneuver whereby the gymnast rotates to one side or the other while keeping arms and legs outstretched, spinning for one or more revolutions.

examples.english: Tom did a cartwheel.
examples.chinese: 汤姆做了一个侧空翻。

current_entries.en_definition: A waterfall or series of small waterfalls.
A series of electrical (or other types of) components, the output of any one being connected to the input of the next.
a particular situation or example of something

examples.english: This is a clear case of discrimination.
examples.chinese: 這是一個明顯的歧視事例。

current_entries.en_definition: a matter being considered by the police or a court

examples.english: The police are investigating the case.
examples.chinese: 警方正在調查這宗案件。

current_entries.en_definition: a container used to hold or protect something

examples.english: Keep the camera in its case.
examples.chinese: 把相機放在保護套內。

current_entries.en_definition: an occurrence of a particular illness

examples.english: The hospital reported two new cases.
examples.chinese: 醫院報告了兩宗新病例。

current_entries.en_definition: Person in charge of the cash of a business or bank.

examples.english: Pay the cashier on the way out.
examples.chinese: 在出口處的收银台付款。

current_entries.en_definition: A large residential building or compound that is fortified and contains many defences; in previous ages often inhabited by a nobleman or king. Also, a house or mansion with some of the architectural features of medieval castles.
A device or weapon for throwing or launching large objects.
A native or inhabitant of the Caucasus.

examples.english: The suspect is a caucasian female.
examples.chinese: 嫌疑人是一位白人女性。

current_entries.en_definition: (anthropology, dated) A member of the Caucasian racial classification (adjective sense 2).
A grouping of all the members of a legislature from the same party.
(countable, often with of, typically of adverse results) The source of, or reason for, an event or action; that which produces or effects a result.

examples.english: The cause of the fire is not known.
examples.chinese: 起火原因不明。

current_entries.en_definition: A road that is raised so as to be above water, marshland, and similar low-lying obstacles, which in some cases may flood periodically (e.g. due to tides). Originally causeways were much like dykes, generally pierced to let water through, whereas many modern causeways are more like bridges or viaducts.
Prudence when faced with, or when expecting to face, danger; care taken in order to avoid risk or harm.
A careful attention to the probable effects of an act, in order that failure or harm may be avoided.
A large, naturally-occurring cavity formed underground or in the face of a cliff or a hillside.

examples.english: What's going on in the cave? I'm curious. "I have no idea."
examples.chinese: 山洞裡發生了什麼事? 我很好奇。"我不知道。"

current_entries.en_definition: The capital city of French Guiana department.
Pertaining to the Cebuano language or to its speakers.
A language spoken in the Philippines in and near the province of Cebu.
Any of a variety of thermoplastics created from nitrocellulose and camphor, once used as photographic film.
(figuratively, often used attributively) The genre of cinema; film.

(geology) A geologic era within the Phanerozoic eon comprising the Paleogene, Neogene and Quaternary periods from about 65 million years ago to the present, when the continents moved to their current position and modern plants and animals evolved.

To review for, and if necessary to remove or suppress, content from books, films, correspondence, and other media which is regarded as objectionable (for example, obscene, likely to incite violence, or sensitive).

examples.english: I wonder which country will be the first to censor Tatoeba.
examples.chinese: 我想知道哪个国家会第一个和谐Tatoeba？

current_entries.en_definition: (cellular automata) A count of the number of individual patterns within a larger pattern, most often the ash of a soup or a methuselah.
The hundredth anniversary of an event or happening.
A continental region in North America, consisting of the countries lying between Mexico and South America.
(Greek mythology) The giant three-headed dog who guards the entrance to Hades; and one of the many offspring of Echidna and Typhon.
A ceremony, or series of ceremonies, prescribed by ritual.
A deep, bright red colour tinted with pink.
A document containing a certified statement.

examples.english: Please attach a certificate of quality.
examples.chinese: 請附上質量證明書。

current_entries.en_definition: An animal belonging to the infraorder Cetacea, including dolphins, porpoises, and whales.
Compare; compare to; compare with.
(dance) A ballroom dance to a Latin American rhythm.
An item of furniture used to sit on or in, comprising a seat, legs or wheels, back, and sometimes arm rests, for use by one person.
